---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea for this project
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Is Your Feature Request Related to a Problem?

<!-- A clear and concise description of the problem you're experiencing or the limitation
     you've encountered. For example: "I'm frustrated when I can't distinguish between
     two work Chrome profiles at a glance because they have generic names." -->

## Describe the Solution You'd Like

<!-- A clear and concise description of what you want to happen.
     Include UI sketches, expected CLI output, or example config if helpful. -->

## Describe Alternatives You've Considered

<!-- A clear and concise description of any alternative solutions or features you've
     considered. This helps maintainers understand the design space and rule out
     approaches that don't fit the project. -->

## Additional Context

<!-- Add any other context, links, or screenshots about the feature request here.
     For example:
     - Does another browser-selector tool implement this well?
     - Is this feature requested frequently by others?
     - Is there a related issue or PR? -->
